## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened (include error messages / console output if any).

## Environment

- Area: [ ] frontend  [ ] backend  [ ] deploy
- Account type: person / business / influencer
- Browser / device:
- URL or route (e.g. `/manage`, `/events`):

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps (network requests, related event/user ids, etc.).
